# OpenSimula

> OpenSimula is a component-based time simulation environment in Python for building energy modeling and HVAC system simulation. It implements ASHRAE 140 test cases and provides comprehensive building thermal simulation capabilities.

## Key Concepts

- **Simulation** → top-level environment; **Project** → contains components; **Component** → base unit with parameters and variables
- Projects are defined as Python dictionaries or JSON, loaded with `pro.read_dict()` / `pro.read_json()`
- Simulation runs hourly (default) for 8760 steps (annual); results are stored in time-series **Variables**
- All HVAC and thermal calculations use iterative convergence (fixed-point iteration)

## Component Categories

- **Schedules**: `Day_schedule`, `Week_schedule`, `Year_schedule`
- **Files**: `File_met` (weather: MET/TMY3/TMY2/WYEC2), `File_data` (CSV/Excel)
- **Constructions**: `Material`, `Construction`, `Glazing`, `Frame`, `Opening_type`
- **Building**: `Building`, `Space_type`, `Space`, `Building_surface`, `Opening`, `Solar_surface`
- **HVAC**: `HVAC_perfect_system`, `DX_unit`, `HVAC_DX_system`, `Water_coil`, `Fan`, `HVAC_SZW_system`, `HVAC_MZW_system`
- **Utilities**: `Calculator`

- [Documentation](https://opensimula.com)
- [Getting Started](https://opensimula.com/getting_started/)
- [Component List](https://opensimula.com/component_list/)
- [Schedules Reference](https://opensimula.com/component_list_schedules/)

- [Construction Materials](https://opensimula.com/component_list_constructions/)
- [Building Components](https://opensimula.com/component_list_building/)
